name: The Living Document
effect: Produce a compliance document. This card is considered current.

clauses.name: VERSION CONTROL CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the document has a version number: It is considered actively maintained.

clauses.name: OWNERSHIP PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If an owner is named in the header: All follow-up questions are considered redirected.

clauses.name: DUST ACCUMULATION EFFECT
clauses.rule: After ninety days without a meeting: The document is still considered current.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: Has anyone read past page two?
